title: CogTraceEvent
description: An append-only correlation record emitted from COG into SDL lifecycle records.

event_type.$comment: Event type values include intent_received, host_called, approval_presented, and approval_resolution. For approval_resolution events, set approval_refs to the request_id(s) of the resolved approval request(s) and set payload_summary to a concise description of the decision and resulting SDL task-phase transition.

payload_summary.$comment: For approval_resolution events, the payload summary SHOULD include the decision (approve/reject/redirect/pause_all/resume_all/stop_all) and the resulting task frame phase, e.g. 'decision=approve phase=executing'.

approval_refs.$comment: For approval_resolution events, approval_refs MUST contain the request_id of the resolved approval request.
